featured.title: Oracle Certified Foundations Associate, Java
featured.desc: Demonstrates foundational knowledge of Java technology and programming, covering core concepts, data structures, and OOP methodologies.
featured.learnt: Java syntax, object-oriented concepts (inheritance, encapsulation, polymorphism), control flow structures, exception handling, data structures, and APIs.

featured.title: Cloud Computing (12-Week Course - Elite)
featured.desc: A rigorous academic course covering the fundamental design, models, resource virtualization, and architecture of cloud infrastructure.
featured.learnt: Cloud design models, SaaS/PaaS/IaaS setups, hypervisors, resource allocation, storage virtualization, MapReduce frameworks.

featured.title: Applied Machine Learning in Python
featured.desc: Advanced machine learning course covering data analysis, predictive modeling, clustering, and deep evaluation strategies.
featured.learnt: Supervised & unsupervised learning algorithms, scikit-learn interfaces, SVM regression, decision trees, cross-validation metrics.

featured.title: Career Essentials in GitHub Professional Certificate
featured.desc: Professional credentials pathway validating workflows optimization, automated actions, and enterprise collaboration.
featured.learnt: Repository environments management, actions configuration settings, collaboration pipelines, Copilot configurations, and search parameters.

collections.name: GitHub Learning Series
collections.description: 4 specialized courses covering GitHub Actions, Copilot automation, Code Search, and collaborative Project management pipelines.

items.title: Practical GitHub Actions
items.desc: Practical implementation of CI/CD pipelines, custom runners, environment variables, and build automation sequences.
items.learnt: Workflow YAML setups, actions triggers, custom runners deployments, artifacts storage triggers, secure keys parameters.

items.title: Practical GitHub Copilot
items.desc: Leveraging AI-assisted prompt triggers, context boundaries, code completions, and debug assistants inline.
items.learnt: Prompt engineering patterns, security completions check, refactoring helpers, inline tests generation.

items.title: Practical GitHub Code Search
items.desc: Advanced search syntax, indexing codes, locating security configurations, and scoping codebases.
items.learnt: Regex code locator, scoping branches metadata, security audits mapping, cross-repo matching syntax.

items.title: Practical GitHub Project Management and Collaboration
items.desc: Managing team project boards, issue trackers, pull request review gates, and branch protections.
items.learnt: Milestones planning, branch locks policies, peer review workflows, conflict resolutions, tags management.

collections.name: Data Analytics Series
collections.description: 3 specialized courses covering Microsoft Power BI Desktop dashboard architectures and Python-powered visualization using Dash.

items.title: Learning Power BI Desktop
items.desc: Visualizing relational data, database connects, and cleaning modeling parameters.
items.learnt: Power Query cleaning filters, data models schemas, measures calculations, interactive visuals grids.

items.title: Power BI Dashboards for Beginners
items.desc: Designing dashboard metrics layouts, sharing portals, and analytics report setups.
items.learnt: Visual layout rules, reports publishing setups, key metrics cards, slicers controllers.

items.title: Data Visualization in Python with Dash
items.desc: Building Python-powered analytics web dashboards using Plotly and Dash frameworks.
items.learnt: Dash layout components, reactive input-output decorators callbacks, Plotly charts rendering, CSS skins styling.

other.title: National Financial Literacy Quiz 2026
other.desc: Certificate of Participation validating knowledge of core personal finance parameters, investment basics, and digital transaction securities.
other.learnt: Digital payments safety checks, basic credit scoring parameters, interest rate indexes calculations, assets diversification rules.
